seo.title: Idle Cash Yield Calculator — what your business cash could earn
seo.description: Free B2B idle cash yield calculator. Compare what your business cash earns at the bank vs at diBoaS conservative return.

hero.headline: What's your business cash earning while it sits?
hero.subtitle: Most business accounts pay near-zero on cash balances. See what conservative return could add.

inputs.idleCashHelp: Cash sitting in your business account today
inputs.bankYieldHelp: Locale default: {rate}%. Override to match yours.

output.differenceZero: At your bank rate, diBoaS matches your local yield over {years} years — and the position is held in digital dollar.
output.differenceNegative: At {bankRate}% your bank actually out-earns diBoaS' conservative scenario over {years} years. diBoaS still gives you a digital-dollar position — the comparison is yield only.
